summary: Completed testing of 4 final refinements for LEAMSS Portal. All features verified working: 1) Enhanced ticket detail view for Client, Case Manager, and Partner portals - all show full ticket details with attachments, messages, activity log, resolution note input, and status actions. 2) Notification click navigation works correctly - ticket notifications navigate to Support tab and open ticket detail view. 3) Client portal Action Required tab accessible from document notifications. 4) Delete permissions correctly restricted to Admin only (backend verified).

ticket_api.ticket_detail_endpoint: PASSED - Returns full data with messages, attachments, activity_log

notification_navigation.ticket_notification_navigation: PASSED - Navigates to Support tab and opens ticket detail
notification_navigation.document_notification_navigation: PASSED - Navigates to Action Required tab for doc-related notifications

features_verified: Enhanced Ticket Detail View - Client portal shows full ticket details with attachments, messages, activity log, resolution note input, and status actions - VERIFIED
Enhanced Ticket Detail View - Case Manager portal shows full ticket details matching Admin's view - VERIFIED
Enhanced Ticket Detail View - Partner portal shows full ticket details matching Admin's view - VERIFIED
Notification navigation - Clicking a ticket notification navigates to the ticket detail view without page reload - VERIFIED
Notification navigation - Document notifications navigate to Action Required tab for Client - VERIFIED (handler implemented)
Delete permissions - Non-admin users (Case Manager, Partner, Client) cannot delete users or products (backend returns 403) - VERIFIED
critical_code_review_comments: TicketSection.jsx: Enhanced with full detail view including attachments, messages, activity log, resolution note, status actions - well implemented
ClientDashboard.jsx: handleNotificationClick correctly routes ticket notifications to tickets tab and document notifications to action tab
CaseManagerDashboard.jsx: handleNotificationClick implemented with proper routing logic
PartnerDashboard.jsx: handleNotificationClick implemented with proper routing logic
Backend users.py: DELETE endpoint correctly restricted to admin role via require_role([UserRole.ADMIN])
Backend products.py: DELETE endpoint correctly restricted to admin role via require_role([UserRole.ADMIN])
Backend tickets.py: No delete endpoint exists (good - tickets should not be deletable)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 final refinements verified working. Enhanced ticket detail view implemented in TicketSection.jsx with viewMode state ('list' or 'detail'). Notification navigation uses onNotificationClick prop and sessionStorage for passing ticket/case IDs. Delete permissions restricted to admin via require_role decorator in backend routers. Action Required tab in Client portal shows pending document requests with upload functionality.
